name: The Channel Distinction
image_sign_text: OMNI. NOT CROSS. THERE IS A DIFFERENCE.
effect: Reframe an existing channel strategy using upgraded terminology. This card is considered unified.

clauses.name: NOMENCLATURE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the word cross-channel appears in any document: Replace it with omnichannel and resubmit for approval.

clauses.name: DEFINITION PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If anyone requests a working definition of omnichannel: Redirect to a whitepaper authored by this card's vendor.

clauses.name: PARITY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the customer experience does not change after the terminology upgrade: The card remains in play.

witness_quote: It's not the same thing, actually.
